<!--------------------------------------------------------------------------------->

Tools for converting SVG and JSON files into Pebble Draw Commands and PDC binary format, with graph utilities.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: License information for the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[graph.py](graph.py.md)**: A Python graph class with methods for adding vertices and edges, finding paths, and pretty printing.
- **[json2commands.py](json2commands.py.md)**: Converts JSON files into Pebble Draw Commands, supporting only PathCommand and handling multiple frames.
- **[pdc_gen.py](pdc_gen.py.md)**: Converts SVG or JSON sequences to PDC binary format for Pebble devices.
- **[pebble_commands.py](pebble_commands.py.md)**: Classes and methods to create and serialize Pebble Images and Sequences using Pebble Draw Commands.
- **[svg2commands.py](svg2commands.py.md)**: Converts SVG files into Pebble Draw Commands, supporting elements like path, circle, and polygon.
